title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions:
Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions!
